build_method: local-first (LM Studio + retriever + validator); Claude top-up on flagged/pseudonymous
finance_trading_boundary: Systematic/quant/markets-execution/derivatives/macro-trading/crypto-trading => Trading. Fundamental/discretionary + corporate finance => Finance. Macro ECONOMISTS stay in Finance; hedge-fund macro TRADERS are here.
notes: Exclude collapsed/fraud names (SBF, Do Kwon, Su Zhu). Pseudonymous personas (Cobie, Hasu) carry lower identity-confidence. Archetypes use persistent_signals.

cells.microstructure-execution: Market microstructure, execution, HFT, technical trading.
cells.risk-systemic: Trading/market risk management and systemic risk.
cells.trader-craft-psychology: What makes great traders — psychology, discipline, the meta-craft.
